var_def: Aggregation level of the row (adm0=country, adm1=GADM L1, adm2=GADM L2).
label: Aggregation level

var_def: GADM region code at this level (GID_1 for adm1, GID_2 for adm2). Unique together with iso; a few disputed regions (e.g. Z0x codes) appear under more than one country.
label: Region code (GID)

var_def: GADM region name at this level (NAME_1 for adm1, NAME_2 for adm2).
label: Region

var_def: GADM region type in English (ENGTYPE_n; e.g. State, Province, Department, County).
label: Region type

var_def: ISO3 country code (GADM GID_0); HKG/MAC/XKX restored to the cell-data codes. For region panels it is the parent country and part of the compound entity key.
label: Country (ISO3)

var_def: Country name (GADM COUNTRY / NAME_0).
label: Country

var_def: Calendar year of the estimate (2012-2022).
label: Year

var_def: Low-population-density adjustment variant. Constant in each export (no_extra_adjust for model-scale panels, 0_05 for the PWT-scaled panels).
label: Threshold

var_def: Sum of model GCP over the region's cells, model-scale const 2021 PPP (provenance).
label: Model GCP (provenance, const 2021 PPP)

var_def: Sum of cell population over the region, persons (provenance).
label: Population (sum of cells, persons)

var_def: Per-year national GDP raking factor = PWT rgdpo / sum(model GCP).
label: GDP raking factor

var_def: Per-year national population raking factor = PWT pop / sum(pop_cell).
label: Population raking factor

var_def: GDP rescaled to PWT; national sum per year equals PWT rgdpo exactly.
label: GDP rescaled to PWT (mil. 2021 US$ PPP)

var_def: Population rescaled to PWT; national sum per year equals PWT pop exactly.
label: Population rescaled to PWT (millions)

var_def: gdp_pwt / pop_pwt, 2021 US$/person; 0 for censored cells, missing if zero population.
label: GDP per capita (2021 US$ PPP)

var_def: Natural log of gdppc; missing where gdppc <= 0 (censored / zero-pop).
label: Log GDP per capita

var_def: Number of 0.25-degree cells aggregated into this region-year.
label: N cells

var_def: Of n_cells, the number placed by the nearest-region fallback (centroid outside all polygons; lower confidence). 0 at adm0.
label: N cells (nearest fallback)

var_def: Penn World Table 11.0 rgdpo for the country-year (national benchmark).
label: PWT real GDP (output-side, mil. 2021 US$)

var_def: Penn World Table 11.0 pop for the country-year.
label: PWT population (millions)

var_def: pwt_rgdpo / pwt_pop (the PWT benchmark per-capita).
label: PWT GDP per capita (2021 US$)

var_def: Natural log of gdppc_pwt; undefined where gdppc_pwt <= 0.
label: Log PWT GDP per capita

var_def: gdp_pwt - pwt_rgdpo (national raking residual; ~0).
label: GDP raking residual

var_def: gdppc - gdppc_pwt (raking residual; ~0).
label: GDP per capita raking residual
